description: OpenGraph meta tags for shareable URLs, loading states for SearchBar, empty search placeholder suggestions, smooth page transitions, and persist last search. Items 7, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13.
steps: Add generateMetadata() export to app/artist/[id]/page.tsx that fetches artist data and returns OpenGraph meta tags (title, description, images with artist artwork). Follow Next.js 16 metadata API patterns.
Add generateMetadata() export to app/album/[id]/page.tsx that fetches album data and returns OpenGraph meta tags (title, description, images with album artwork).
Add generateMetadata() export to app/track/[id]/page.tsx that fetches track data and returns OpenGraph meta tags (title, description, images with track artwork).

The SearchBar already has a shimmer loading state in InstantResults.tsx when isFetching is true - verify this works correctly. Also add a subtle spinner/shimmer to the SearchBar input itself (a small animated indicator next to the Cmd+K badge) while isFetching is true to provide immediate feedback.

The SearchBar already shows trending searches (Taylor Swift, Drake, BTS, Billie Eilish, The Weeknd) as placeholder suggestions in the dropdown when input is empty. Add visual 'Try searching for:' text above the trending section in SearchSuggestions.tsx to make it more discoverable, and also show this text as part of the input placeholder when there's no query on the /search page.

The app/components/ui/PageTransition.tsx already exists with animate-page-enter. It's not used anywhere currently. Wrap the {children} in app/layout.tsx with PageTransition to enable fade-in animations on route changes.

Update lib/recent-searches.ts to also export a getLastSearch() function that returns the most recent search query. Update the SearchBar component to pre-fill the input with the last search when the user navigates to /search without a ?q= param (only on the search page, not on homepage). This persists the last search across sessions.
acceptance_criteria: Artist pages have OpenGraph meta tags with artist name and artwork image
Album pages have OpenGraph meta tags with album name, artist, and artwork image
Track pages have OpenGraph meta tags with track name, artist, and artwork image
SearchBar shows a loading indicator while fetching suggestions
Empty search state shows 'Try searching for:' with example artists
Page transitions have a subtle fade-in animation when navigating
Returning to /search pre-fills the last searched query
Build passes with zero TypeScript errors and zero lint errors
findings: All steps completed. OpenGraph metadata added to artist/album/track pages using Next.js 16 async params pattern. SearchBar now shows a Loader2 spinner beside the Cmd+K badge while fetching. SearchSuggestions trending section label updated to 'Try searching for:'. PageTransition wraps children in layout.tsx for fade-in on route changes. getLastSearch() added to lib/recent-searches.ts and SearchBar pre-fills on /search page when no ?q= param. Build and lint pass with zero errors.
